opportunities.rationale: Shopee parent crashed ~24% on 3 Mar after Q4 missed EPS despite revenue beat; heavy investment spend spooked markets. RSI hit deeply oversold levels. Revenue and EBITDA growth remain intact, suggesting sentiment-driven selling. Require stabilisation above 87 before entry; stop below crash-day low around 82.

MongoDB dropped ~27% on 3 Mar after softer FY27 guidance overshadowed a Q4 beat with +27% YoY revenue. Multiple brokers maintained Buy / Overweight ratings with targets well above spot, indicating structural growth intact. Entry on a hold above 260 in oversold territory; invalidated below 245.

BioNTech fell ~17% on 10 Mar after guiding to lower Covid-19 vaccine revenue, overshadowing a sizeable oncology and mRNA pipeline. The single-session gap-down into RSI ~28 fits the panic-stabilisation rebound pattern, with a strong balance sheet and Citi PT around 130 providing fundamental support. Require stabilisation above 77 before entry; invalidated below 70.

Amazon dropped ~9% in early Feb after guiding for roughly $200B of 2026 capex, far above prior expectations, despite strong Q4 revenue and re-accelerating AWS. Since then the stock has partially recovered but remains below pre-report levels. Capex shock and AI-spending fatigue drove the move, not demand deterioration; mean reversion back toward 238 resistance remains the base case, invalidated on a daily close below 200.
